title: From +3.25 to +0.5: Arrav's Natural Vision Recovery Journey
transcript: We traveled from Delhi to try Amar Eye Yoga for my son, Arrav, and the results have been incredible. Last year, he had a +3.25 cylindrical and spherical power in both eyes. After our first visit and practicing the recommended eye muscle exercises, his vision improved significantly. We just completed our second visit, and his power has dropped all the way down to +0.5! We are so grateful to Dr. Amarendra and the team for their natural, effective approach to eye care. Highly recommended!

title: From a Medical Rejection to Clear Sight: Raghavi's Story
transcript: When my daughter Ravgavi was selected for Sainik School, we were absolutely thrilled, but our hearts broke when she didn't pass the medical test due to a high eye power of 2.7. Other doctors told us she would need to wear glasses for her entire life. Refusing to give up, I searched online for holistic alternatives and found Amar Eye Yoga Center in Pondicherry. We stayed for just 10 days, and the results were incredible! Through their completely natural methods, treatments, and natural medicines, Ravgavi's power reduced from 2.7 to 1.0. I am so incredibly happy and finally have hope that my daughter won't need to depend on glasses anymore. Thank you so much to the team for your life-changing, natural care!

title: Overcoming Medical Rejection: Saksham's AFCAT Success Story
transcript: My name is Saksham, and I was recently recommended for the AFCAT entry. However, I faced a massive setback when I received a Temporary Rejection (TR) during my medical exam due to an issue with my cornea thickness. I consulted several different doctors, but they all clearly told me that nothing could be done to fix it. Thankfully, I didn't give up and found Amar Eye Health Yoga in Pondicherry. After taking their treatment, I have seen incredibly positive results. If you are a defense aspirant or anyone facing eye-related issues during a medical exam, I highly recommend getting in touch with them. They will definitely be able to help solve your problem!

title: Ditching the Specs: A Natural Vision Success Story
transcript: My stay and the eye exercises at Amar Yoga have been a truly wonderful experience. Since completing the program, I have actually been able to stop using my specs entirely! I feel so much better, and it is incredibly nice to have my natural vision back. I started noticing improvements within just a few days, and even taking a few days off, I saw steady progress over three weeks. I plan to continue with the practices I've learned here to maintain my eye health. Thank you so much to the team for all the help!

title: OTA Army Aspirant: Clearing Medicals with Natural Eye Therapy
transcript: My name is Ankit Dagar, and I am from Delhi. I was absolutely thrilled to be recommended for the Army through OTA, but unfortunately, I faced a major setback when I didn't pass my medical exams due to my eyesight. My vision was 6/12 in my left eye and 6/6 in my right. Thankfully, I learned about Amar Sir and decided to try his natural eye therapy. The results speak for themselves—my vision is now a perfect 6/6 in both eyes! I am incredibly satisfied with this therapy and so grateful for the help in clearing my path to the Army.

title: Natural Vision Improvement: Sajeerathan's Success Story
transcript: My name is Sajeerathan. I came to Amar Eye Yoga with a power of 1.75 in my right eye and -2.0 in my left. After my sessions and practicing the eye exercises, my power has gone down! My right eye is 1.75, but my left eye has successfully reduced to 1.5. I am very happy with these results and my stronger eye muscles.

title: Reducing Eye Power Naturally: Tashwin's Experience
transcript: Hello, my name is Tashwin. I came to Amar Eye Yoga with a high power of 2.5 in both my eyes. I was happy to learn about their natural exercises and special glasses. After completing my sessions and practicing the eye yoga regularly, my vision has improved so much! Now both my eyes have a power of 1.5. I am so happy and grateful to the amazing team for helping me see better naturally. Thank you!

title: Dropping Eye Power Fast: Akilan's Journey
transcript: My name is Akilan. When I started, I had a power of 1.5 in one eye and 0.5 in the other. Thanks to the natural eye exercises at Amar Eye Yoga, my power has reduced significantly! Now it is down to 0.25 and 0.5. The improvement has been great and happened very quickly.

title: Improving Astigmatism Naturally: Rithuparan's Story
transcript: My name is Rithuparan. My starting power in my right eye was -2.5 with cylindrical power, and my left eye was -1.0. After practicing the eye exercises here, my right eye has improved to -1.75, and my left eye is holding steady at -1.0. I am really pleased with the progress I've made in reducing my prescription.

title: Lowering High Prescriptions Naturally: Pavan's Success
transcript: My name is Pavan Kishor. Last time, my eye power was quite high—3.0 in my right eye and 3.5 in my left. After my natural eye therapy sessions, both of my eyes have improved down to a power of 2.5! Thank you to the team for helping me reduce my power.

title: Healing Strabismus Naturally: 50% Improvement in Just 15 Days
transcript: My name is Vijayarajan, and we brought our 7-year-old son, Rudresh, to Amar Eye Yoga for treatment of a severe squint and nystagmus (shaking eyes). We were only able to stay for 15 days due to our schedule, but the progress has been remarkable. While it isn't 100% cured yet, we have seen an incredible 50 to 60% improvement in his condition! We are very confident that with a little more time and continuing the exercises at home, it will be fully resolved. The entire staff and the doctors were wonderfully cooperative, and my son actually enjoyed his time learning the exercises. We highly recommend this natural approach to anyone dealing with similar eye issues.
